Name: year
Description: Represents the financial year for which we are generating indeed import export data.

Name: pct_change_yr_compr
Description: represents how many year back the current years data is compared to.

Name: cntry_cd
Description: Unique code assigned to every country

Name: exp_inr_cr
Description: Indias export in crore in indian rupee for a particular financial year for a particular country

Name: exp_pct_change
Description: Percentage change in India’s export value for the country, compared between the current year and the year that is n years prior, where n is defined by pct_change_yr_compr

Name: exp_pct_share
Description: Percentage export share of  that country compared to India’s total export for all the country for a particular financial year

Name: imp_inr_cr
Description: Indias import in crore in indian rupee for a particular financial year for a particular country

Name: imp_pct_share
Description: Percentage import share of  that country compared to India’s total import for all the country for a particular financial year

Name: imp_pct_change
Description: Percentage change in India’s import value for the country, compared between the current year and the year that is n years prior, where n is defined by pct_change_yr_compr

Name: trd_dft_inr_cr
Description: Indias trade deficit (export-import) in crore in indian rupee for a particular financial year for a particular country

Name: trd_dft_pct_change
Description: Percentage change in India’s trade deficit (export - import) value for the country, compared between the current year and the year that is n years prior, where n is defined by pct_change_yr_compr

Name: trd_dft_pct_share
Description: Percentage trade deficit (export-import) share of  that country compared to India’s total total trade deficit for all the country for a particular financial year
